agent-onboard.draftBody: Skill: Agent Onboard Durable Work Principle — Two Ask Rule If you ask twice, the agent failed. First request is discovery. Second means it should already be a skill on cron. Every new agent MUST be taught this from day one: The Lifecycle 1. Prototype — do it manually 3 10 times, show output 2. Evaluate — get approval, revise 3. Codify — write SKILL.md or ext
